channel.title: flove making-of — cubes questions
channel.description: New cubes design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Should flove have per-app cube downloads?
item.description:
• Yes, per-app cubes — Each app gets its own zip. Users download what they need. Needs builder script. • No, flove.zip only — One big bundle. Simpler, but larger download. • Defer — Don't build yet — revisit when more apps exist.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer
